title: Monorepo + pnpm + Next.js/TS/ESM + CI (build/test/lint) skeleton
context: Public-Official-Guide needs a working multi-tenant monorepo skeleton before any feature or content work can begin. The stack is TypeScript/ESM, Next.js 15 App Router, pnpm workspaces, Prisma/PostgreSQL/pgvector (added in task 005), Clerk for auth, and a CI pipeline (build/test/lint). This task creates the skeleton that all later code tasks merge into. Agent-neutral core: provider-specific code stays in adapters/. No secrets committed.
objective: Bootstrap the monorepo with pnpm workspaces, Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript/ESM, Clerk auth scaffolding, and a green CI pipeline (build + test + lint passing), so subsequent tasks have a known-good base to build on.
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm monorepo with Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript, ESM config committed and building without errors
CI pipeline (build + test + lint) is green on the PR
Clerk multi-tenant auth scaffolding present; every data row will be scoped to a tenant from the first commit
Agent-neutral LLM client stub in place (no vendor-specific code in core packages)
No secrets, tokens, or API keys committed; .env.example documents required variables
README documents how to run locally
output: A merged PR adding the monorepo skeleton with green CI, pnpm workspaces, Next.js 15 App Router, TypeScript/ESM, Clerk scaffolding, and an agent-neutral LLM client stub.
